import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        i = i + 1
      else
        mut neg = false
        if b == 45
          neg = true
          i = i + 1
        else if b == 43
          i = i + 1
        end
        mut val = 0
        mut parsing = true
        while parsing
          if i >= n
            parsing = false
          else
            match string.byte_at(s, i)
            when Some(c)
              if c >= 48 and c <= 57
                val = val * 10 + (c - 48)
                i = i + 1
              else
                parsing = false
              end
            when None
              parsing = false
            end
          end
        end
        if neg
          val = 0 - val
        end
        result = list.push(result, val)
      end
    when None
      i = n
    end
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  mut line1 = ""
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    line1 = s
  when None
    line1 = ""
  end
  mut line2 = ""
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    line2 = s
  when None
    line2 = ""
  end
  let nums = parse_ints(line1)
  let trimmed = string.trim(line2)
  mut target = 0
  match string.parse_int(trimmed)
  when Some(t)
    target = t
  when None
    target = 0
  end
  let len = list.len(nums)
  mut found = false
  mut fi = 0
  mut fj = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < len and not found
    mut j = i + 1
    while j < len and not found
      mut a = 0
      mut b = 0
      match list.get(nums, i)
      when Some(v)
        a = v
      when None
        a = 0
      end
      match list.get(nums, j)
      when Some(v)
        b = v
      when None
        b = 0
      end
      if a + b == target
        found = true
        fi = i
        fj = j
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if found
    println("found=#{fi},#{fj}")
  else
    println("none")
  end
end
